audience_policies.source_phrase: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Offers free admission for your group on most Boston by Foot walking tours (does not include: Footloose on the Freedom Trail, Beacon with a Boo, any water-based tours, or any private tours).
